error_signature: app doesn’t fetch the correct data from dynamic URLs
title: Dynamic URLs not fetching correct data on page load
symptom: When users open a shared direct link, the app fails to fetch the correct data, leaving the collection empty.
applies_when: Using dynamic route parameters in URLs
Users access the app via shared links
not_this_if: Users navigate internally within the app
root_cause: The app does not automatically read dynamic parameters from the URL on initial page load, which prevents it from fetching the corresponding data from the backend when accessed directly.
fix_steps: Create a URL parameter in the app that corresponds to the dynamic ID (e.g., chat_id).
Link the collection items on the dynamic page to the created URL parameter variable.
Test by sharing the URL and ensuring the correct data is populated.
agent_instruction: Create a URL parameter for the dynamic ID and link it to the collection items on the page.
